reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar e instalaciones impecables en cuanto a la sanitizacion,
Lo único es que el personal de la cafetería entra tarde y si uno quiere seguir camino  temprano a la mañana se tiene que ir sin desayunar pese a que esta contemplado en el arancel del alquiler de la habitación, o comprar un desayuno en cualquiera de las estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place and impeccable facilities in terms of sanitation.
The only thing is that the cafeteria staff arrives late, and if you want to continue early in the morning, you have to leave without breakfast, even though it's included in the room rental fee, or buy breakfast at any of the gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxMk56eHVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, desayuno y cocheras individuales, buenas habitaciones para ser Motel y baños renovados, en Junio 2021 bar inhabilitado, se desayuna en habitación. Cerca del Motel varios opciones de Restaurant y bares

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, breakfast, and individual parking spaces. The rooms are decent for a motel, and the bathrooms have been renovated. The bar was closed in June 2021; breakfast is served in your room. There are several restaurants and bars near the motel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxel9tZmV3EAE
